scripts.setup:macos: echo "@wgw/api: macOS Apache helpers removed with legacy runtime; see repo INSTALL.md after API is restored"
scripts.preview:macos: echo "@wgw/api: preview requires a Laravel runtime; not available in contract-only mode"
scripts.typegen:openapi:check: pnpm run typegen:openapi && git diff --exit-code -- openapi/generated/openapi.built.json openapi/generated/openapi-types.ts openapi/generated/mail-types.ts openapi/generated/notes-types.ts openapi/generated/settings-types.ts openapi/generated/settings-request-zod.ts openapi/generated/admin-types.ts openapi/generated/drive-types.ts openapi/generated/voice-types.ts
